name: circuits
description: LandChain zero-knowledge circuits: commitment opening, registry membership, challenge-response ownership, and area range proofs.

scripts.compile: circom circuits/commitmentProof.circom --r1cs --wasm --sym -o build && circom circuits/landOwnership.circom --r1cs --wasm --sym -o build && circom circuits/challengeProof.circom --r1cs --wasm --sym -o build && circom circuits/areaRange.circom --r1cs --wasm --sym -o build
